description:
As a system stakeholder
  I want to verify the complete order lifecycle (Create -> Bid -> Accept -> Deliver)
  So that I can ensure business value is delivered regardless of the interface (API or UI)

elements.name: Customer creates order, driver bids, customer accepts, driver delivers

steps.name: "Alice" publishes an order for "Urgent Documents" priced at "50.00"

steps.name: the order "Urgent Documents" should be available in the marketplace
"Bob" places a bid of "45.00" on order "Urgent Documents"
"Alice" should see a bid of "45.00" from "Bob"
"Bob" should see the order in their "Active" list
"Bob" wallet should be credited with "45.00" less commission
"Bob" reviews "Alice" with "5" stars and comment "Great customer, easy pickup."
the review should be submitted successfully
"Alice" reviews "Bob" with "5" stars and comment "Excellent driver, very fast."
the review should be submitted successfully

name: Core Order Lifecycle
